post.description:
Endpoint to create a Person in Nexus.
A Person is the main entity in Nexus.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: PersonId in Nexus or Identifier

parameters.description: Person Id in Nexus or Identifier

parameters.description: Person Id in Nexus or UserReference.

patch.description:
Endpoint to patch a person in Nexus. This method allows the update only the fields that are sent in the request.
Null values are ignored, if the additional property of TreatEmptyAsNull is set to true empty values will also be ignored.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Person Identifier in Nexus.

requestBody.description: Request with the fields to patch.

patch.summary: Patch the groups that a group belongs to
patch.description: Patch the groups that a group belongs to

patch.summary: Updates the nodes a person manages
patch.description: Updates the nodes a person manages

patch.summary: Patch the groups that a team belongs to
patch.description: Patch the groups that a team belongs to

get.summary: Get Teams with members and managers from nexus.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page to return.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Size of the page to return.

200.description: Contains list of teams, members and managers.

get.description: Returns all subscriptions for the users in the tenant.

200.description: Contains list of all people with related subscription name for the tenant.

get.description: Returns person subscription information based on person identifier.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Person ID in EntityKey format (TenantId:PersonId) or User Reference.

200.description: Contains person ID, user reference, and their assigned subscription type.

put.summary: Assign, replace, or unassign the app subscription for a Person.
put.description: To assign app subscription to a person using PersonId in Nexus or UserReference.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Person Id in Nexus or UserReference.

requestBody.description: Request containing subscription type [-1 = Unassign, 1 = SOS, 2 = Pro].

subscriptionType.description: For subscription type: | Value | Description | |-------|---------------| | 1 | SOS | | 2 | PRO | |-------|---------------| Required
For subscription type: | Value | Description | |-------|---------------| | 1 | SOS | | 2 | PRO | | -1 | None | |-------|---------------|. Required

id.description: Id of the Group from the Nexus.
Id of the group from the Nexus.
Id of the person from Nexus.

userReference.description: External reference to the person in the client system. It will be used to identify the person instead of the Nexus id.

emailAddress.description: Email address of the person will be used as the username to login in to Nexus.

hasPortalAccess.description: Determines if the person has access to Nexus.

dateOfBirth.description: Persons date of birth. In UTC format.

sexAssignedAtBirth.description:
For sex assigned at birth possible values are:
Female
Male
Prefer not to say

roles.description:
Permission level in Nexus:
Admin - 2
Manager - 3
User - 4
EscalationContact - 5

pin.description: Pin used during verification on phone lines and in the app. Must be between 0001 and 9998

contactPhoneNumbers.description: Collection of phone numbers. Maximum length is 4. Available types are: Work - 1 Personal - 2 Home - 3 Office - 4 Each type can by only once in collection

emergencyContacts.description: Collection of emergency contacts. Maximum length is 3.
